evidence: "I would classify this as an action-thriller movie."
"It is a well thought out western, reminiscent of movies like The Unforgiven."
"The characters seem to be stereotypes stolen from other animated films over the years."
"The storyline is clear and easy to follow, the villain is not too scary for most children."
"This movie drags compared to the original."
"I wish there was just a little more of both."
"This is not a show to watch with the kids, unless they're teens or older (the ratings should make this obvious)."
"I loved that they chose one of my favorite actresses, Jodie Whittaker, from Broadchurch."
"I have watched all previous seasons of Endeavor Morse."
"Between the effects, the well choreographed fight scenes and the masterful acting this movie is destined to be a classic."
"The idea that living your life to the fullest vs. dreaming about doing it resonates with the viewer."
"This is not a family movie. R-ratings should give you enough hint on that."

summary: The user enjoys action and sci-fi genres, with a particular fondness for westerns. They prefer straightforward narratives and have a mixed view on pacing, often appreciating sensory experiences like effects and humor, while showing moderate sensitivity to production quality.
